meaning: n.<小儿语>鹅,呆子,笨蛋adj.愚蠢的
examples: I know you're used to loosed-goosey. But I run a much tighter ship.
The pace slows, relaxation begins and even parents get to act a little loose goosey .
Yeah yeah, there are exceptions: perfectionist operations in China, loosey-goosey ones in Japan.
In fact, the tart is so loosey-goosey in its construction that I can give you only a rough guess on the number of apples you'll need.
Depending upon how loose you want to be with your statistics, the frequency is either staying the same (conservative stats) or actually in decline (loosey-goosey stats).
